name: Auto Generate Onboarding Checklist
script:
# Only run on first save (new document)
if not doc.is_new():
    pass
else:
    checklists = {
        "Web Development": [
            {"task": "NDA Signed", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "Repository Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Domain Access Shared", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Design Handover", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Sprint 1 Planning Done", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
        ],
        "QA Automation": [
            {"task": "Test Environment Setup", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Test Plan Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Tools Access Given", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Automation Framework Selected", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
        ],
        "ERP Implementation": [
            {"task": "Requirement Gathering Done", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "ERPNext Site Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "Module Configuration Started", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
        ],
        "Mobile App": [
            {"task": "NDA Signed", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "Repository Created", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "API Design Finalized", "responsible": "Tech Lead"},
            {"task": "UI Mockups Approved", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
            {"task": "Sprint 1 Planning Done", "responsible": "Project Manager"},
        ]
    }

    project_type = doc.project_type
    if project_type and project_type in checklists:
        doc.checklist = []
        for item in checklists[project_type]:
            doc.append("checklist", {
                "task": item["task"],
                "responsible": item["responsible"],
                "due_date": doc.start_date,
                "done": 0
            })

name: Weekly PM Project Summary
script:
from frappe.utils import nowdate, get_datetime

# Only run on Mondays
import datetime
if datetime.datetime.now().weekday() != 0:
    pass
else:
    # Get all active onboarding projects
    projects = frappe.get_all(
        "Client Project Onboarding",
        filters={"status": ["in", ["Kickoff Scheduled", "In Progress", "On Hold"]]},
        fields=["name", "project_name", "client_name", "status", "project_manager", "start_date"]
    )

    # Group by project manager
    pm_projects = {}
    for project in projects:
        pm = project.project_manager
        if pm not in pm_projects:
            pm_projects[pm] = []
        pm_projects[pm].append(project)

    # Send summary email to each PM
    for pm, pm_project_list in pm_projects.items():
        # Calculate checklist completion for each project
        project_summary = ""
        for p in pm_project_list:
            checklist = frappe.get_all(
                "Onboarding Checklist Item",
                filters={"parent": p.name},
                fields=["done"]
            )
            total = len(checklist)
            done = len([c for c in checklist if c.done])
            percent = round((done / total * 100), 1) if total > 0 else 0

            project_summary += f"""
Project: {p.project_name}
Client: {p.client_name}
Status: {p.status}
Start Date: {p.start_date}
Checklist Completion: {done}/{total} ({percent}%)
---
"""

        # Get PM email
        pm_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", pm, "email")
        if pm_email:
            frappe.sendmail(
                recipients=[pm_email],
                subject=f"Weekly Project Summary - {nowdate()}",
                message=f"""Dear {pm},

Here is your weekly summary of active onboarding projects:

{project_summary}

Please ensure all projects are on track.

Best Regards,
Atrina Technologies
"""
            )

frappe.logger().info("Weekly PM summary emails sent")

name: Onboarding Before Save
script:
if doc.status == "Kickoff Scheduled" and not doc.sow_attached:
    frappe.throw("SOW must be attached before scheduling kickoff.", title="SOW Required")
